arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: ق ۚ وَالْقُرْآنِ الْمَجِيدِ
english translation text:
Qaf. By the glorious Quran.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: بَلْ عَجِبُوا أَن جَاءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ الْكَافِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَيْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
english translation text:
Indeed they consider it odd that a warner from among themselves should have come to them. So the faithless say, ‘This is an odd thing.’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: أَإِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌ بَعِيدٌ
english translation text:
‘What! When we are dead and have become dust, [shall we be raised again]? That is a far-fetched return!’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ الْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَابٌ حَفِيظٌ
english translation text:
We know what the earth diminishes from them, and with Us is a preserving Book.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا بِالْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَاءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِي أَمْرٍ مَّرِيجٍ
english translation text:
Indeed, they denied the truth when it came to them; so they are now in a perplexed state of affairs.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَاهَا وَزَيَّنَّاهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ
english translation text:
Have they not, then, observed the heaven above them, how We have built it and adorned it, and that there are no cracks in it?
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَالْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَاهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَاسِيَ وَأَنبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ بَهِيجٍ
english translation text:
And We spread out the earth, and cast in it firm mountains, and caused every delightful kind [of vegetation] to grow in it.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ
english translation text:
[In this there is] an insight and admonition for every penitent servant.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً مُّبَارَكًا فَأَنبَتْنَا بِهِ جَنَّاتٍ وَحَبَّ الْحَصِيدِ
english translation text:
We send down from the sky salubrious water, with which We grow gardens and the grain which is harvested,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَالنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَاتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ
english translation text:
and tall date palms with regularly set spathes,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ الْخُرُوجُ
english translation text:
as a provision for Our servants, and with it We revive a dead country. Likewise will be the rising [from the dead].
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَأَصْحَابُ الرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
english translation text:
The people of Noah denied before them, and [so did] the people of Rass and Thamud,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَانُ لُوطٍ
english translation text:
and ‘Ad, Pharaoh, and the brethren of Lot,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَأَصْحَابُ الْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ ۚ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ الرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
english translation text:
and the inhabitants of Aykah and the people of Tubbac. Each [of them] impugned the apostles, and so My threat became due [against them].
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: أَفَعَيِينَا بِالْخَلْقِ الْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِي لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
english translation text:
Have We been exhausted by the first creation? No, they are in doubt about a new creation.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِ نَفْسُهُ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ
english translation text:
Certainly We have created man and We know to what his soul tempts him, and We are nearer to him than his jugular vein.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى الْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ الْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ الشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ
english translation text:
When the twin recorders record [his deeds], seated on the right hand and on the left:
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ
english translation text:
he says no word but that there is a ready observer beside him.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَجَاءَتْ سَكْرَةُ الْمَوْتِ بِالْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
english translation text:
The throes of death bring the truth: ‘This is what you used to shun!’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ الْوَعِيدِ
english translation text:
And the Trumpet will be blown: ‘This is the promised day.’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَجَاءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَائِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ
english translation text:
Every soul will come accompanied by [two angels], a driver, and a witness:
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِي غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَاءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ الْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ
english translation text:
[he will be told] ‘You were certainly oblivious of this. We have removed your veil from you, and so today your eyesight is acute.’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
english translation text:
Then his companion [angel] will say, ‘This is what is ready with me [of his record of deeds].’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: أَلْقِيَا فِي جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
english translation text:
[The two angels accompany him will be told,] ‘Cast every obdurate ingrate into hell,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ
english translation text:
[every] hinderer of good, transgressor, and skeptic,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: الَّذِي جَعَلَ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِي الْعَذَابِ الشَّدِيدِ
english translation text:
who had set up another god along with Allah and cast him into the severe punishment.’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: قَالَ قَرِينُهُ رَبَّنَا مَا أَطْغَيْتُهُ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِي ضَلَالٍ بَعِيدٍ
english translation text:
His companion [devil] will say, ‘Our Lord! I did not incite him to rebel [against You], but he was [himself] in extreme error.’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا لَدَيَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِالْوَعِيدِ
english translation text:
He will say, ‘Do not wrangle in My presence, for I had already warned you in advance.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: مَا يُبَدَّلُ الْقَوْلُ لَدَيَّ وَمَا أَنَا بِظَلَّامٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
english translation text:
The word [of judgement] is unalterable with Me, and I am not tyrannical to My servants.’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ امْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ
english translation text:
The day when We shall say to hell, ‘Are you full?’ It will say, ‘Is there any more?’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَأُزْلِفَتِ الْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
english translation text:
And paradise will be brought near for the Godwary, it will not be distant [any more]:
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ
english translation text:
‘This is what you were promised. [It is] for every penitent and dutiful [servant]
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: مَّنْ خَشِيَ الرَّحْمَٰنَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَجَاءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
english translation text:
who fears the All-beneficent in secret and comes with a penitent heart.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: ادْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَامٍ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ الْخُلُودِ
english translation text:
Enter it in peace! This is the day of immortality.’
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: لَهُم مَّا يَشَاءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
english translation text:
There they will have whatever they wish, and with Us there is yet more.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا فِي الْبِلَادِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
english translation text:
How many generations We have destroyed before them, who were stronger than these, insomuch that they ransacked the towns?! So, is there any escape [from Allah’s punishment]?
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى السَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
english translation text:
There is indeed an admonition in that for one who has a heart, or gives ear, being attentive.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We created the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, in six days, and any fatigue did not touch Us.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: فَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ الشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ الْغُرُوبِ
english translation text:
So be patient at what they say, and celebrate the praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before the sunset,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَمِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَارَ السُّجُودِ
english translation text:
and glorify Him through part of the night and after the prostrations.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: وَاسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ الْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ
english translation text:
And be on the alert for the day when the caller calls from a close quarter,
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ الصَّيْحَةَ بِالْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ الْخُرُوجِ
english translation text:
the day when they hear the Cry in all truth. That is the day of rising [from the dead].
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْيِي وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا الْمَصِيرُ
english translation text:
Indeed it is We who give life and bring death, and toward Us is the [final] destination.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ الْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ
english translation text:
The day the earth is split open for [disentombing] them, [they will come out] hastening. That mustering is easy for Us [to carry out].
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’

arabic text: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَا أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِالْقُرْآنِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
english translation text:
We know well what they say, and you are not there to compel them. So admonish by the Quran those who fear My threat.
Qaf – The Letter ‘Qaf’
